items.name_en: Small Size 🚩🚩🚩 CHANEL 25P Chaebol Heiress Look Summer New Vacation Item The double-C buckle is ceramic, very exquisite and elegant, suitable for many occasions. Horse lovers are falling in love with Chanel again ~ 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Black with white 🐻‍❄️ color CF Cherry Blossom Season ~ As if the season of cherry blossoms turned into a bag, wow ~ Every part of the bag 💖 reveals the breath of spring. She is simply a healing existence, making every day of girls 👧 full of sweetness and gentleness la la! Small Size: 12.5 X 19.5 X 3.5 CM

items.name_en: Crystal Silver Large Size OHANEL Vintage Have you seen this bag? Who doesn't love Black Silver!! 🍋🍋 The lazy style Black Silver hobo hits my aesthetic perfectly! Silver rod on the side, double C pendant with zipper, embossed logo, I love every detail ahhh! Casual yet high-end when worn. Can be carried by hand, underarm, or clutch. The leather is soft and has a great texture, full of lazy vibes!! I suggest everyone should own it! Love brain reached the peak, I can't control the silver rod hobo glossy large shoulder crossbody bag. Low-key, lazy, and casual. This series is too popular. Shoulder, underarm, and crossbody bag styles. Beauty and practicality combined. It's really too practical for going out!
